status: exact finite action-labelled collapse of the pinned observed x-axis Bellman core; not a universal promotion automaton, birth closure, availability bound, or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/x_axis_core_promotion_probe.py run --output /tmp/x-axis-core-promotion-probe-canonical.json

action_coverage.interpretation: The recorded words are a policy-specific sample, not a statistical sample or a universal action set.

required: singleton endpoint occupancy for each relevant lateral class as well as active two-endpoint line presence
a truncated legal-history occupancy 0/1/2, with a distinct insertion into occupancy 1 creating an x-line
exact axial collision data or a separately certified collision frontier
actual ordered connector interiors for the selected word
an honest coexistence representation for endpoint and line states on one realized path
minimal_missing_universal_state.reason: Every retained transition carries one existing endpoint pair unchanged. The pinned artifact contains no singleton-occupancy table and no birth edge for a new x-line.

proved_by_finite_computation: the 13203 observed core occurrences collapse to 1312 exact geometric states
the complete combined killed-word mask is congruent on every geometric state
the carried-line successor is congruent after the actual action and ordered slot are retained
all finite realized return mappings remain in the observed Bellman core
refuted_or_missing: the strict-versus-collision role is not determined by the geometric state in 92 classes
the geometric state does not determine the policy action
the artifact does not close singleton occupancy or new-line births
unobserved connector actions, L9/later closure, availability, and a safety fixed point remain untreated
referee_interpretation.next_exact_test: Scan every effective-domain word for unique action/slot prefix controls, recompute a full-domain Bellman barrier, enumerate its finite integer x-core, and add exact singleton-occupancy insertion transitions before a BDD or antichain safety test.
